ddls:
CREATE TABLE "data_uploads" (
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data upload */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the data */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., e-commerce, healthcare, finance) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the data was uploaded */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the uploaded data */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the uploaded data in MB */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the upload (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "validation_result" TEXT /* Result of data validation (e.g., valid, invalid) */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was validated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_uploads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_uploads_source FOREIGN KEY ("source") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Active status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the data source */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data source (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the data source was last updated */,
  "data_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data expected from this source (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data upload */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data version (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the version */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_upload_id FOREIGN KEY ("upload_id") REFERENCES data_uploads ("upload_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search trend record */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data version */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the search trend */,
  "searches" REAL /* Number of searches */,
  "observed" INTEGER /* Observed outcome */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location or region from which the searches originated */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for the searches (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_trends_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES data_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_trends_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lstm_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each LSTM prediction record */,
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* ID of the search trend record */,
  "lstm_prediction" REAL /* LSTM prediction value */,
  "lstm_error" REAL /* LSTM prediction error */,
  "model_version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the LSTM prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lstm_predictions_trend_id FOREIGN KEY ("trend_id") REFERENCES search_trends ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lstm_predictions_model_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "naive_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Naive prediction record */,
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* ID of the search trend record */,
  "naive_prediction" REAL /* Naive prediction value */,
  "naive_error" REAL /* Naive prediction error */,
  "model_version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the Naive prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_naive_predictions_trend_id FOREIGN KEY ("trend_id") REFERENCES search_trends ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_naive_predictions_model_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prediction_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the prediction model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used in the model */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was created */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date and time when the model was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the model (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prediction model */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the model */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the model version (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the version */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES prediction_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the performance record (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the performance record */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the performance record was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "viz_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization record */,
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* ID of the search trend record */,
  "viz_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., line chart, bar chart) */,
  "chart_title" TEXT /* Title of the chart */,
  "chart_description" TEXT /* Description of the chart */,
  "chart_data" TEXT /* Data used in the chart */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the visualization (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the visualization */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the visualization was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("viz_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_trend_id FOREIGN KEY ("trend_id") REFERENCES search_trends ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the report in MB */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the report */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
